title: Perfect
why_this_song: Repeated adjective 'perfect' in a simple declarative pattern. Vocabulary is everyday and emotional — ideal for A1 students practicing simple statements.

vocab_hooks.note: long adjective; teach stress pattern BEAU-ti-ful

grammar_callouts: I found X / I have found X — simple vs present perfect

lines: I found a love for me
Well, I found a girl, beautiful and sweet

prompts.label_en: Sing the chorus — the iconic line
prompts.label_pt: Cante o refrão — o verso icônico
lines: Baby, I'm dancing in the dark

exercises.prompt_en: Fill the blank in the chorus:

exercises.model_answer_pt: Querida, você está perfeita esta noite
exercises.teacher_note: English uses 'look' where Portuguese uses 'estar' — important distinction from 'to be' (ser/estar).

exercises.prompt_en: Ed Sheeran describes the moment he met someone. Describe a moment you'll always remember — it doesn't have to be romantic.
exercises.prompt_pt: Ed Sheeran descreve o momento em que conheceu alguém. Descreva um momento que você vai lembrar para sempre — não precisa ser romântico.

teaching_notes_md: **Pedagogy:** Short words, slow pace, repetitive chorus — a safe first-time listening exercise. Vocabulary crosses into A2 when discussing the verse narrative.
